# KD Marketing

> KD Marketing UG (haftungsbeschränkt) is a German digital marketing agency based in Gersthofen (Augsburg area, Bavaria). It helps small and medium-sized businesses get found on Google: search engine optimization (SEO), Google Maps / local SEO, content marketing, AI search optimization, Google Ads, and fast conversion-focused websites. Free initial analysis, monthly cancellable contracts, transparent monthly reporting.

Website: https://kd-marketing.com/
Contact: kdmarketingug@gmail.com (reply within 24 hours)

## Services

- **SEO (Suchmaschinenoptimierung)**: technical SEO, content, backlinks — sustainable top rankings on Google. Core competency.
- **Google Maps & Local SEO**: Google Business Profile optimization, reviews, local rankings.
- **Content marketing**: landing pages, blog articles, category texts that rank and convert.
- **AI SEO / AI search**: optimizing content to be cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity and Google AI Overviews.
- **Google Ads**: paid campaigns with efficient budget management.
- **Websites & landing pages**: fast, SEO-ready, conversion-focused sites.

## How it works

1. Analysis & potential: free audit report with priorities.
2. Strategy & roadmap: action plan with timeline and realistic goals.
3. Execution & reporting: ongoing optimization, monthly reports (rankings → visitors → inquiries).

## Company

- Legal name: KD Marketing UG (haftungsbeschränkt)
- Address: Aldeinerstraße 2, 86368 Gersthofen, Germany
- Managing director: Ekaterina Dmitrieva
- Register: Amtsgericht Augsburg, HRB 39025
- Market: Germany (German-speaking clients)
- Conditions: monthly cancellable, free first analysis
